ClothesItem.title: ClothesItem
ClothesItem.description: Represents an inventory clothing pattern or item in Knesset Yechezkel Clothing Sales Room.

id.description: Unique identifier for the clothing item model.

name.description: Name or title of clothing item.

category.description: Category of the garment (e.g. Shirts, Pants).

costPrice.description: Wholesale supplier cost price in ILS.

sellPrice.description: Consumer sale price to students in ILS.

minStock.description: Threshold trigger level to send email alerts.

imageUrl.description: Base64 or external URL of clothing image preview.

sizes.description: Map representing size elements as keys and stock count as values.

SaleLog.title: SaleLog
SaleLog.description: Tracks historic sales and stock movements for profit calculation and auditing.

SystemSettings.title: SystemSettings
SystemSettings.description: Global customization parameters for branding and low-stock email triggers.

/settings/config.description: Configuration document for alert parameters and customization.
